name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 11 Apr 2025
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release includes updates from eCommerce releases "},{"text":"6.325.0","bold":true},{"text":", "},{"text":"6.326.0","bold":true},{"text":", and "},{"text":"6.327.0","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENT","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Decommissioned Legacy Payment Gateways","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Continuing with the decommissioning of legacy payment gateways to streamline our systems and improve site speeds, the following payment gateways are no longer supported:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"eWay Hosted\nNote: The eWay Rapid API and eWay Secure Panel are still supported."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Paymark Click"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Maxis Pay"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"New Parameter OriginCountry in GetItem API","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"A new response parameter - "},{"text":"OriginCountry","bold":true},{"text":" - has been added to the "},{"text":"GetItem","bold":true},{"text":" API.  See the "},{"type":"a","url":"https://developers.maropost.com/documentation/engineers/api-documentation/products/getitem","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"GetItem"}]},{"text":" API for details."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"BUG FIXES","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where in some cases, payment surcharges were removed from the order. The issue occurred if:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"the order was paid using Google Pay or Apple Pay"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"the order was put on hold and the product subtotal was recalculated after being placed"}]}]}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
